en: Now the serpent was more crafty than any other beast of the field that the LORD God had made. He said to the woman, "Did God actually say, 'You shall not eat of any tree in the garden'?"
zh: 在耶和華 神所造野地所有的活物中，蛇是最狡猾的。蛇對女人說：“ 神真的說過，你們不可吃園中任何樹上的果子嗎？”

en: And the woman said to the serpent, "We may eat of the fruit of the trees in the garden,
zh: 女人對蛇說：“園中樹上的果子，我們都可以吃；

en: but God said, 'You shall not eat of the fruit of the tree that is in the midst of the garden, neither shall you touch it, lest you die.'"
zh: 只有園中那棵樹上的果子， 神曾經說過：‘你們不可吃，也不可摸，免得你們死。’”

en: But the serpent said to the woman, "You will not surely die.
zh: 蛇對女人說：“你們決不會死；

en: For God knows that when you eat of it your eyes will be opened, and you will be like God, knowing good and evil."
zh: 因為 神知道你們吃那果子的時候，你們的眼睛就開了；你們會像 神一樣，能知道善惡。”

en: So when the woman saw that the tree was good for food, and that it was a delight to the eyes, and that the tree was to be desired to make one wise, she took of its fruit and ate, and she also gave some to her husband who was with her, and he ate.
zh: 於是，女人見那棵樹的果子好作食物，又悅人的眼目，而且討人喜愛，能使人有智慧，就摘下果子來吃了；又給了和她在一起的丈夫，他也吃了。

en: Then the eyes of both were opened, and they knew that they were naked. And they sewed fig leaves together and made themselves loincloths.
zh: 二人的眼睛就開了，才知道自己是赤身露體的。於是把無花果樹的葉子編縫起來，為自己做裙子。

en: And they heard the sound of the LORD God walking in the garden in the cool of the day, and the man and his wife hid themselves from the presence of the LORD God among the trees of the garden.
zh: 天起涼風的時候，那人和他的妻子聽見耶和華 神在園中行走的聲音，就藏在園子的樹林中，躲避耶和華 神的面。

en: But the LORD God called to the man and said to him, "Where are you?"
zh: 耶和華 神呼喚那人，對他說：“你在哪裡？”

en: And he said, "I heard the sound of you in the garden, and I was afraid, because I was naked, and I hid myself."
zh: 他回答：“我在園中聽見你的聲音，就害怕；因為我赤身露體，就藏了起來。”

en: He said, "Who told you that you were naked? Have you eaten of the tree of which I commanded you not to eat?"
zh: 耶和華 神說：“誰告訴你，你是赤身露體呢？難道你吃了我吩咐你不可吃的那樹上的果子嗎？”

en: The man said, "The woman whom you gave to be with me, she gave me fruit of the tree, and I ate."
zh: 那人說：“你所賜給我、和我在一起的那女人，她把樹上的果子給我，我就吃了。”

en: Then the LORD God said to the woman, "What is this that you have done?" The woman said, "The serpent deceived me, and I ate."
zh: 耶和華 神對女人說：“你作了甚麼事呢？”女人說：“那蛇欺哄我，我就吃了。”

en: The LORD God said to the serpent, "Because you have done this, cursed are you above all livestock and above all beasts of the field; on your belly you shall go, and dust you shall eat all the days of your life.
zh: 耶和華 神對蛇說： “因為你作了這事， 就必在所有的牲畜 和田野的活物中受咒詛； 你要用肚子行走， 一生都吃泥土。

en: I will put enmity between you and the woman, and between your offspring and her offspring; he shall bruise your head, and you shall bruise his heel."
zh: 我要使你和女人彼此為仇， 你的後裔和女人的後裔， 也彼此為仇， 他要傷你的頭， 你要傷他的腳跟。”

en: To the woman he said, "I will surely multiply your pain in childbearing; in pain you shall bring forth children. Your desire shall be for your husband, and he shall rule over you."
zh: 耶和華 神對女人說： “我要大大增加你懷胎的痛苦， 你必在痛苦中生產兒女； 你要戀慕你的丈夫， 他卻要管轄你。”

en: And to Adam he said, "Because you have listened to the voice of your wife and have eaten of the tree of which I commanded you, 'You shall not eat of it,' cursed is the ground because of you; in pain you shall eat of it all the days of your life;
zh: 耶和華 神又對亞當說：“因為你聽從了你妻子的話，吃了我吩咐你不可吃的那樹上的果子； 地就必因你的緣故受咒詛； 你必終生勞苦，才能從地裡得吃的。

en: thorns and thistles it shall bring forth for you; and you shall eat the plants of the field.
zh: 地要給你長出荊棘和蒺藜來； 你也要吃田間的蔬菜；

en: By the sweat of your face you shall eat bread, till you return to the ground, for out of it you were taken; for you are dust, and to dust you shall return."
zh: 你必汗流滿面， 才有飯吃， 直到你歸回地土， 因為你是從地土取出來的； 你既然是塵土，就要歸回塵土。”

en: The man called his wife's name Eve, because she was the mother of all living.
zh: 亞當給他的妻子起名叫夏娃，因為她是眾生之母。

en: And the LORD God made for Adam and for his wife garments of skins and clothed them.
zh: 耶和華 神為亞當和他的妻子做了皮衣，給他們穿上。

en: Then the LORD God said, "Behold, the man has become like one of us in knowing good and evil. Now, lest he reach out his hand and take also of the tree of life and eat, and live forever-"
zh: 耶和華 神說：“那人和我們中間的一個相似，能知善惡；現在恐怕他伸出手來，摘取生命樹上的果子吃，就永遠活著。”

en: therefore the LORD God sent him out from the garden of Eden to work the ground from which he was taken.
zh: 耶和華 神就把他趕出伊甸園，去耕種他自己也是從那裡出來的地土。

en: He drove out the man, and at the east of the garden of Eden he placed the cherubim and a flaming sword that turned every way to guard the way to the tree of life.
zh: 於是把亞當驅逐出去，又派基路伯在伊甸園的東邊，拿著旋轉發火燄的劍，把守到生命樹去的路。
